example_tasks: Issue a warning to the team about the deadline
Announce the start of the meeting
Signal a change in project scope
Alert users to a system outage
Call a halt to the current process
Get the attention of the stakeholders
Stop the production line for inspection
Notify the public about a safety concern
Call for a timeout on the project
Make a public announcement about the event
reasoning: The whistle icon clearly represents signaling, alerting, or enforcing rules, making it useful for tasks involving communication of urgency or directives. It has a strong visual metaphor and is unlikely to be misinterpreted.
